programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.2m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 16.0km/h ESE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 34.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: 🌊 0.9m @ 11s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 0.9m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h ESE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 35.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
